About Us

The #1 Place to Source All Your Industrial Materials

Stellar Global Supplies is a one-stop solution for all industrial procurement needs — specialising in trading and sourcing of high-quality raw materials. We cater to diverse industries with a commitment to seamless sourcing, reliable quality, and on-time delivery.

Mission-Driven Sourcing

We don't just procure — we partner. Every order is matched to your exact requirement, spec, and budget.

Quality You Can Count On

Every batch is verified before dispatch. No shortcuts, no substitutions — only materials that meet the mark.

One-Stop Procurement

Mild Steel, Stainless Steel, Fasteners — sourced from verified suppliers and delivered to your doorstep.

On-Time, Every Time

Your production schedule won't slip because of us. We treat deadlines as a commitment, not a target.

Why Stellar Global

Why Thousands of Buyers Choose Us

We've built our reputation on four pillars: speed, quality, transparency, and support. Here's what that looks like in practice.

Single-Source Simplicity

Stop juggling 10 vendors. Every material — MS, SS, and Fasteners — from one trusted partner. Less friction, more focus on your production.

Speed That Matches Demand

Urgent order? We move fast. Our supply chain is built for velocity without compromising verification.

Zero-Compromise Quality

Every product is sourced from verified suppliers and checked before it leaves our facility.

Dedicated Support

A real person answers when you call. One point of contact, full accountability.

Built for Every Industry

Manufacturing, construction, pharma, food processing, auto — we understand your sector's material standards and deliver accordingly.

ManufacturingConstructionPharmaAutoFood Processing

Manufacturing
Construction
Electronics

Our Products

Everything Your Industry Needs, In One Place

Browse our wide-ranging catalogue of industrial materials — each product precision-sourced and quality-verified before delivery.

Structural strength for every application — 8 products

Mild Steel

MS Angles

Versatile angular sections for structural frameworks.

Mild Steel

MS Flats

Precision-rolled flat bars for fabrication needs.

Mild Steel

MS Round Pipes

Seamless round pipes for fluid & structural use.

Mild Steel

MS Sheet

Hot-rolled sheets for industrial fabrication.

Mild Steel

MS Square Tubes

Hollow square sections for construction & furniture.

Mild Steel

MS Channels

C-section channels for beams and support structures.

Mild Steel

MS Chequered Plate

Anti-slip patterned plates for flooring & ramps.

Mild Steel

MS Galvanised Sheets

Zinc-coated sheets for superior corrosion resistance.

Need something not listed? We source custom requirements too.
